---
title: "11_final_table_figures"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 1. Load packages and result tables
#--------------------------------------------------

library(tidyverse)
library(here)

dir.create(here("outputs", "tables"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(here("outputs", "figures"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

expr_model_summary <- read_csv(
  here("outputs", "tables", "expression_model_summary.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

expr_auc_summary <- read_csv(
  here("outputs", "tables", "expression_auc_summary.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

meth_model_summary <- read_csv(
  here("outputs", "tables", "methylation_model_summary.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

meth_auc_summary <- read_csv(
  here("outputs", "tables", "methylation_auc_summary.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

multi_model_summary <- read_csv(
  here("outputs", "tables", "multiomic_model_summary.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

multi_auc_summary <- read_csv(
  here("outputs", "tables", "multiomic_auc_summary.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 2. Add source labels
#--------------------------------------------------

expr_model_summary <- expr_model_summary %>%
  mutate(data_source = "Expression")

meth_model_summary <- meth_model_summary %>%
  mutate(data_source = "Methylation")

multi_model_summary <- multi_model_summary %>%
  mutate(data_source = "Multiomic")

expr_auc_summary <- expr_auc_summary %>%
  mutate(data_source = "Expression")

meth_auc_summary <- meth_auc_summary %>%
  mutate(data_source = "Methylation")

multi_auc_summary <- multi_auc_summary %>%
  mutate(data_source = "Multiomic")

```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 3. Combine model summaries
#--------------------------------------------------

all_model_summary <- bind_rows(
  expr_model_summary,
  meth_model_summary,
  multi_model_summary
) %>%
  mutate(
    model = recode(
      model,
      "ElasticNet" = "Elastic Net",
      "RandomForest" = "Random Forest"
    )
  )

all_auc_summary <- bind_rows(
  expr_auc_summary,
  meth_auc_summary,
  multi_auc_summary
) %>%
  mutate(
    model = recode(
      model,
      "ElasticNet" = "Elastic Net",
      "RandomForest" = "Random Forest"
    )
  )

print(all_model_summary)
print(all_auc_summary)

write_csv(
  all_model_summary,
  here("outputs", "tables", "all_model_summary_extended.csv")
)

write_csv(
  all_auc_summary,
  here("outputs", "tables", "all_auc_summary_extended.csv")
)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 4. Create final comparison table
#--------------------------------------------------

final_comparison_extended <- all_model_summary %>%
  select(data_source, model, ROC, Sens, Spec, ROCSD, SensSD, SpecSD) %>%
  left_join(
    all_auc_summary,
    by = c("data_source", "model")
  ) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  arrange(desc(ROC))

print(final_comparison_extended)

write_csv(
  final_comparison_extended,
  here("outputs", "tables", "final_model_comparison_extended.csv")
)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 5. Cleaner display table for report
#--------------------------------------------------

report_table <- final_comparison_extended %>%
  mutate(
    ROC = round(ROC, 3),
    Sens = round(Sens, 3),
    Spec = round(Spec, 3),
    auc = round(auc, 3)
  ) %>%
  select(
    "Data source" = data_source,
    Model = model,
    "CV ROC" = ROC,
    `Pooled AUC` = auc,
    Sensitivity = Sens,
    Specificity = Spec
  )

print(report_table)

write_csv(
  report_table,
  here("outputs", "tables", "report_model_table.csv")
)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 6. AUC comparison bar chart
#--------------------------------------------------

p_auc <- final_comparison_extended %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = data_source, y = ROC, fill = model)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  labs(
    title = "Cross-validated ROC by data source and model",
    x = "Data source",
    y = "CV ROC"
  )

print(p_auc)

ggsave(
  here("outputs", "figures", "auc_comparison_extended.png"),
  plot = p_auc,
  width = 9,
  height = 5
)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 7. Best overall model summary
#--------------------------------------------------

best_overall <- final_comparison_extended %>%
  slice_max(order_by = ROC, n = 1, with_ties = TRUE)

print(best_overall)

write_csv(
  best_overall,
  here("outputs", "tables", "best_overall_models.csv")
)
```
```{r}
best_by_source <- final_comparison_extended %>%
  group_by(data_source) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = ROC, n = 1, with_ties = TRUE) %>%
  ungroup()

write_csv(
  best_by_source,
  here("outputs", "tables", "best_by_data_source.csv")
)
```

```{r}
best_single_omics <- final_comparison_extended %>%
  filter(data_source %in% c("Expression", "Methylation")) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = ROC, n = 1, with_ties = TRUE)

write_csv(
  best_single_omics,
  here("outputs", "tables", "best_single_omics_model.csv")
)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 8. ROC curves from saved CV predictions
#--------------------------------------------------

library(pROC)

expr_preds <- read_csv(
  here("outputs", "tables", "expression_cv_predictions.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>%
  mutate(data_source = "Expression")

meth_preds <- read_csv(
  here("outputs", "tables", "methylation_cv_predictions.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>%
  mutate(data_source = "Methylation")

multi_preds <- read_csv(
  here("outputs", "tables", "multiomic_cv_predictions.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>%
  mutate(data_source = "Multiomic")

rf_preds <- bind_rows(expr_preds, meth_preds, multi_preds) %>%
  filter(model == "RandomForest") %>%
  mutate(
    model_label = paste(data_source, "Random Forest")
  )

roc_df <- rf_preds %>%
  group_by(model_label) %>%
  group_modify(~ {
    roc_obj <- roc(
      response = .x$obs,
      predictor = .x$Yes,
      levels = c("No", "Yes"),
      direction = "<"
    )
    
    tibble(
      specificity = roc_obj$specificities,
      sensitivity = roc_obj$sensitivities
    )
  }) %>%
  ungroup()

p_roc <- roc_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = 1 - specificity, y = sensitivity, colour = model_label)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +
  geom_abline(
    intercept = 0,
    slope = 1,
    linetype = "dashed",
    colour = "grey50"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "ROC curves for Random Forest models",
    x = "False positive rate",
    y = "True positive rate",
    colour = "Model"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)

print(p_roc)

ggsave(
  here("outputs", "figures", "roc_curves_random_forest.png"),
  plot = p_roc,
  width = 8,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 300
)
```
